purpose: Map all deployment paths, authority surfaces, and topology boundaries for the MindShift Cloudflare Workers production deployment.

worker_config.d1_preview: none — preview environment has no D1 binding

deployment_paths.name: Governed production deploy
deployment_paths.trigger: Manual workflow_dispatch on governed-deploy.yml, entered through prepare-governed-deploy.yml
steps: governed-deploy.ts: artifact validation → enforceGovernedDeployCommand → npx wrangler deploy

deployment_paths.name: Cloudflare Git Integration auto-deploy
deployment_paths.trigger: Push to tracked branch with Git Integration enabled at account level
steps: Cloudflare builds and deploys worker directly
deployment_paths.status: CONTAINMENT_REQUIRED — must be disabled at account level
deployment_paths.containment_action: Disable in Cloudflare dashboard: Workers & Pages > mindshift-demo > Settings > Build & deployments

deployment_paths.name: Local wrangler deploy (production)
deployment_paths.trigger: Developer runs `wrangler deploy` or `npx wrangler deploy` locally with valid CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
deployment_paths.observability: PARTIAL — Cloudflare dashboard records deploy; MindShift proof registry has no entry
deployment_paths.status: CLASSIFIED_OPEN — package.json deploy script disabled as convenience guard; requires account-level token restriction for full containment

deployment_paths.name: Local governed-deploy.ts invocation
deployment_paths.trigger: Developer runs `npx tsx scripts/governed-deploy.ts artifact.json npx wrangler deploy` with MINDSHIFT_GOVERNED_DEPLOY_CONTEXT=github_actions_governed and valid CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
steps: governed-deploy.ts validates legitimacy artifact (requires canonical chain artifact)
deployment_paths.status: RESIDUAL_BYPASS — requires both valid canonical artifact AND CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN AND governed context variable

deployment_paths.name: Preview environment deploy
steps: Preview worker cannot execute canonical routes against production state
deployment_paths.status: CONTAINED_BY_ENVIRONMENT_SEPARATION — preview has no production D1 binding

deployment_paths.name: Unauthorized workflow_dispatch
deployment_paths.trigger: Arbitrary GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch on governed-deploy.yml with fabricated inputs
steps: CALLER_WORKFLOW_REF check validates the caller is governed-deploy.yml
All canonical chain endpoints must return canonical responses
/compile must return hash matching supplied validated_object_hash
Authority expiry must be in future (derived from /authority response)
deployment_paths.observability: FULL — workflow run logs; canonical chain responses uploaded as artifacts
deployment_paths.status: BLOCKED — hard-fail checks at each canonical chain step

topology_invariants: Only PATH-001 is a governed production mutation path
PATH-002 must be disabled at account level to eliminate uncontrolled production deploys
PATH-003 and PATH-004 are classified as root break-glass authority; observable via Cloudflare dashboard and deploy_audit_registry.json respectively
PATH-005 cannot reach production surfaces due to environment isolation in wrangler.toml
PATH-006 is blocked by hard-fail checks in governed-deploy.yml
production_mutation_invariant: No production-capable Cloudflare mutation path exists outside governed deployment lineage after PATH-002 is disabled at the account level.
